meaning: adj.因余醉未醒感到难受的,心里难受的
examples: He was still hungover on the 25-minute bus ride to work the following morning.
They look like handmade shit...hungover badly from the hibernation drugs.
I write better when I'm hungover and tied to a lamppost without access to my hands.
Nope, he was hungover and partied out, again by his own admission.
By contrast, in younger people, cAMP levels are lower, which is why those memory lapses tend to be limited to being hungover or sleep-deprived.
